{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|= |Nimzowitsch Defence| |rd| |bd|qd|kd|bd|nd|rd|= |pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|= | | |nd| | | | | |= | | | | | | | | |= | | | |pl|pl| | | |= | | | | | | | | |= |pl|pl|pl| | |pl|pl|pl|= |rl|nl|bl|ql|kl|bl|nl|rl|= || }} = Nimzowitsch Defence = White has set up a powerful pawn center. It's time for Black to counter-attack. [[/2...d5/]] is the main line and generate tension on both pawns. [[/2...e5/]] can transpose into the [[Chess/Scotch Game|Scotch Game]], but other continuations are also possible, either a center collapse after 3. dxe5 or a closed game after 3. d5. ==Theory table== {{ChessTable}} '''1. e4 Nc6 2. d4'''
